case_title: ARKADY BERGER VS. BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH SIDES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BERGER, ARKADY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BERGER, ARKADY AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGER, ARKADY AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERGER, ARKADY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $235.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PARTIES ARE BOUND BY THE MONTREAL CONVERSIONS AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED COMPENSATION UNDER THE CONVERSION. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS AN ADJUSTMENT IN THE CONVERSION RATE FOR SPECIAL DRAWING RIGHTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
